description: In the 'E-Commerce Platform' project, restructure the backlog by creating two new epic-level work packages and assigning existing work packages as their children to form a hierarchy. Create two new work packages (Type: Feature or Task) with the subjects 'Search & Discovery Epic' and 'Checkout & Payments Epic'. Set 'Search & Discovery Epic' as the parent for 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch', 'Implement product recommendation engine', and 'Design new product page layout'. Set 'Checkout & Payments Epic' as the parent for 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari'. Perform these actions in the OpenProject web interface at http://localhost:8080 (Login: admin / Admin1234!).
